name: ai-mcp-bridge
description: Peer-to-peer mesh for AI sessions and web pages over MCP (stdio) — gateway election, sub-peers, hierarchical topics, publish/send, encrypted bodies.

scripts.test: node tests/test_mesh.mjs && node tests/test_subpeers.mjs && node tests/test_topics.mjs && node tests/test_identity.mjs && node tests/test_consent.mjs && node tests/test_dashboard.mjs && node tests/test_page_e2e.mjs && node tests/test_federation.mjs
